holdings.infoBox: QLVE is an equity ETF with a total of 167 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 14.80%, Samsung Electronics at 7.66%, SK hynix at 3.77%, International Holding Company PJSC at 3.60%, and Tencent Holdings at 2.38%.

overview.description: The FlexShares Emerging Markets Quality Low Volatility Index Fund (QLVE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap equities from emerging markets. Holdings are selected for quality and low volatility. QLVE was launched on Jul 15, 2019 and is issued by FlexShares.
